## Description

Explain the motivation behind this refactoring. What parts of the codebase were simplified, restructured, or optimized, and why?

## Refactored Components

List the files and directories touched:
- E.g., `backend/core/aditya_memory.py`

## Verification and Safety

- [ ] All existing unit tests pass (`pytest`).
- [ ] No behavioral or API-breaking changes were introduced.
- [ ] Code has been manually tested with the Electron frontend to check interface regression.
- [ ] Linters and formatters pass cleanly.

## Key Goals Met

- [ ] Clean code / reduction of code complexity.
- [ ] Performance optimizations (if any).
- [ ] Improved maintainability or readability.
